app.title: Discover Your Political Match
app.subtitle: Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly Election, 2026
app.tagline: Answer 30 policy questions. Find out which party's positions are closest to your beliefs.
landing.accessibilityParties: Political parties covered in this questionnaire
disclaimer.text: These results reflect your stated policy preferences and are not a voting recommendation. This tool is independent and not affiliated with any political party.
onboarding.title: How It Works
onboarding.step1: Answer policy questions about issues that matter to you
onboarding.step2: The system maps your beliefs to ideological dimensions
onboarding.step3: Your result shows which party aligns with your views
onboarding.privacyStatement: No personal data is collected and no account is required
onboarding.subtitle: Read this before you begin
onboarding.accessibilitySection: Onboarding section explaining how the tool works
processing.title: Computing your results
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.config: Configuration could not be loaded. Please refresh the page.
analytics.disclosure.title: Anonymous Usage Statistics
analytics.disclosure.body: This tool collects anonymous, aggregated usage statistics to help improve the experience. No personal data or individual responses are stored.
